description: A live web app for managing a UGC creator programme — VIP relationships, active ambassadors, and sourcing targets with persona filters, video confidence ratings, and ready-to-copy outreach DMs.

customize.description: Your brand name. Appears in the app header.
A one-line subtitle shown in the app header beneath the brand name.

post-install.name: Build creator programme app
post-install.description: Compiles the frontend and server into deployable bundles.

post-install.name: Verify app is ready
post-install.description: Confirms the built frontend and backend entrypoint exist.

post-install.name: Get app URL
post-install.description: Surfaces the live URL for the creator programme app.

post-install.name: Populate creator data
post-install.description: Walks through adding brand name, VIP relationships, ambassadors, and sourcing targets. Can be re-run any time.

changelog.notes: Initial release. Two-tab app: access panel (VIP relationships + ambassador programme) and sourcing list with persona filters, video confidence, tier system, and copy-to-clipboard outreach DMs. Creator data served from a brain JSON file — no rebuild needed when content changes.
